reason: Geopolitical tensions escalating with oil price spikes are driving broad market risk-off sentiment, leading to U.S. stock futures bleeding and Bitcoin slipping below key levels. Significant outflows from Bitcoin and Ether ETFs indicate sustained institutional selling pressure. Upcoming economic data (U.S. jobs report) and corporate earnings add to market uncertainty and potential volatility. The general market tone for crypto is bearish, despite isolated gains in niche altcoins.
headlines: Riot Platforms, Core Scientific earnings, U.S. jobs report: Crypto Week Ahead
Bitcoin slips below $66,000, U.S. stock futures bleed as Iran hits Saudi oil refinery
Over $9 billion flees bitcoin and ether ETFs in four months
Bitcoin, cryptos under pressure as oil spikes 6% and global markets price in U.S.-Iran conflict
Hyperliquid's HYPE token jumps 5% as Iran war brings windfall revenue, JUP gains on supply freeze
